nasb.text: And I will also be diligent that at any time after my departure you will be able to call these things to mind.

esv.text: And I will make every effort so that after my departure you may be able at any time to recall these things.

cnv.text: 我也要努力，使你們在我去世以後，還時常追念這些事。

ccb.text: 我要尽力使你们在我离世以后仍然常常记得这些事。

csbs.text: 我也要努力，使你们在我离世以后，时常想起这些事。
